case_title: MICHELLE MALIA CONNOR VS JULIUS LEVAI DBA QUALITY CAMERA REPAIR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY MICHELLE MALIA CONNOR AS TO DEFENDANT JULIUS LEVAI DBA QUALITY CAMERA REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
